ai_features_disclosed.description: Rule-based matching of inbound payments to outstanding invoices. The vendor characterizes this as automation, not AI.

pii_processing_claims.handling_notes: Vendor retains transaction records for 10 years per EU AML retention requirements. Reference text is processed for matching but not analyzed for content beyond regex-based identifier extraction (according to vendor).

data_residency.conditions: EU and UK customer data stored exclusively in EU data centers (Frankfurt and Dublin). UK data subject to UK GDPR; EU data subject to GDPR with standard contractual clauses for any incidental processor access.

vendor_disclosed_subprocessors.name: Stripe Payments Europe Ltd.
vendor_disclosed_subprocessors.role: Card and ACH payment processing infrastructure

vendor_disclosed_subprocessors.name: Sift Science Inc.
vendor_disclosed_subprocessors.role: Fraud scoring and risk decisioning via machine learning models

vendor_disclosed_subprocessors.name: Hugging Face Inc.
vendor_disclosed_subprocessors.role: Hosted inference endpoint for transaction description classifier (sentence-transformers model)
